description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, elongated body with a streamlined nose and a dark, glossy exterior. The front section is capped with a blue-tinted, semi-transparent cover, likely serving as a windscreen or nose cone. The main body is predominantly black with subtle metallic and greenish accents, and it includes visible mechanical components and a side-mounted rod or antenna. The seating area is compact, with a single, contoured seat and a raised backrest, designed for one rider. The handlebar is angular and extends outward, equipped with visible grips and control elements. The overall design emphasizes speed and maneuverability, with a modern, high-performance aesthetic suitable for urban waterways.
description: A sleek, black jet ski with a blue-tinted nose, compact single seat, and angular handlebars, featuring metallic and green accents.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the elongated body, blue-tinted nose, and detailed mechanical components along the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed blue nose, narrow body, and the angular handlebar extending outward.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile with the side-mounted rod/antenna and visible seat contours.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the raised backrest, compact seat, and the symmetrical placement of mechanical parts.
attribute_handlebar_design: Angular, black handlebar with outward-extending grips and visible control elements, possibly made of metal and rubber.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, contoured seat with a raised backrest, black in color, designed for one rider.
